title: Spells, LOS & Undead Immunity
subtitle: Sandbox B
intro: Wizard arrives with EVERY spell in hand. A skeleton stands one square west; a goblin stands three squares west, behind the skeleton. Test cases: (1) cast Sleep on the skeleton — should be refused (undead immune). (2) cast Ball of Flame on the goblin while the skeleton blocks the line — should be refused (no LOS). (3) kill the skeleton with Ball of Flame, then cast on the goblin — LOS now clear, should work. (4) Heal Body on yourself — a no-op while at full HP, but should still consume the card.

objective.text: Slay the skeleton and the goblin.
